name: Kiếm Chỉ Giang Hồ: Khai Thiên

detail.description:
Decision approving the content of the online video game G1, number: 187/QD-PTTH&TTĐT, issued by the Ministry of Information and Communications on April 14, 2026

Phong Van Giang Ho, Legends Begin with You!
